response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analysed the video and identified two songs. 2. Performed web searches for lyrics and metadata for 'Color rise harmony' and 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. 3. Mapped the scenes and populated the JSON schema with metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a birthday live performance for the VTuber Hakui Koyori. It features a group performance of 'Color rise harmony' followed by a cover of the song 'My Soul, Your Beats!' from the anime Angel Beats!.

scenes.description: The performance of the song 'Color rise harmony' by Hololive IDOL PROJECT, featuring Hakui Koyori and other members.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Houshou Marine, Sakura Miko, AZKi
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Harmony 重ねた言葉 届け
たどたどしく描いてはぎこちないと笑ってた未来予想 あの日の続きを見よう
手と手 繋いで 風も着こなして扉を叩いて 連れてくよどんなこともきっと一緒なら叶えていける
【La-la-la-la】鳴りやまない 希望のベル ほら【La-la-la-la】聞こえてる歌 Ah

Harmony 重ねた言葉鮮やかな日々の向こうずっと君と 彩るよストーリー
ハートに結んだ夢が空へ駆けてゆくキラメキに乗せてあなたへ 届けメロディー どこまでも！

何気ないこと思い出す一人じゃないよって深呼吸未体験楽しむ 魔法の言葉
一息ついて ふと振り返ってまた君を知って そのたびにちょっと勇気出して明日へ飛び込んでいける
【La-la-la-la】降り積もる 道しるべは まだ【La-la-la-la】憶えてる歌 Ah

Harmony 手を伸ばしたら足跡に 虹がかかるきっと晴れる 口ずさむステージ
ハートに記した場所へ運ぶ 約束を輝きに乗せて世界へ 響けメロディー いつまでも！

【La-la-la-la】君と踏み出したあの一歩 あの瞬間が
【La-la-la-la】宝物だって 胸を張る今
【La-la-la-la】歩いて 話して はしゃいで 笑顔でゆくんだ
【La-la-la-la】色褪せないまま
【La-la-la-la】混ざり合う 僕らの声 ほら【La-la-la-la】聞こえてる歌 Ah

Harmony 重ねた言葉鮮やかな日々の向こうずっと君と 彩るよストーリー
ハートに結んだ夢が空へ駆けてゆくキラメキに乗せてあなたへ 届け世界へ 響け愛を 込めて メロディー どこまでも！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Harmony
Words layered together, deliver them
Painting them clumsily, we laughed saying it was awkward
Let's see the continuation of that day's future prediction
Holding hands, wearing the wind as well
Knocking on the door, I'll take you there
If we're together, we can surely make anything come true
[La-la-la-la] The hope bell that won't stop ringing, look
[La-la-la-la] A song that you can hear, Ah

Harmony
Beyond the vivid days of words layered together
Always with you, we'll color the story
Dreams tied to our hearts run toward the sky
Carried on the sparkle, delivered to you
Melody, anywhere!

Remembering casual things, 'I'm not alone' I take a deep breath
Enjoying the unexperienced, magic words
Taking a breath, suddenly looking back, getting to know you again
Every time that happens, I pluck up a little courage
And can jump into tomorrow
[La-la-la-la] The pile-up signpost is still
[La-la-la-la] A song I remember, Ah

Harmony
If I stretch out my hands, a rainbow arches over the footprints
It will surely clear up, a stage I hum to
Carrying the promise inscribed in my heart
Carried on the radiance, resound to the world
Melody, forever!

[La-la-la-la] That first step we took together
That moment is a treasure, I'm proud of it now
[La-la-la-la] Walking, talking, romping around, we go with smiles
[La-la-la-la] Still without fading
[La-la-la-la] Our mingled voices, look
[La-la-la-la] A song that you can hear, Ah

Harmony
Beyond the vivid days of words layered together
Always with you, we'll color the story
Dreams tied to our hearts run toward the sky
Carried on the sparkle, delivered to you
Resound to the world, putting love into it
Melody, anywhere!

scenes.description: Instrumental bridge with heart-themed visual effects.
Performance of the song 'My Soul, Your Beats!' by Hakui Koyori, AZKi, and other members.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す眠り朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐると
ほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹き抜ける風

聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾億の星が消え去ってくのを
見送った手を振った、よかったねと

廊下の隅見下ろす掃除の途中
おかしなものだと思う
あたしの中の時は止まってるのに
違う日々を生きてるように
誇りは雪のように降り積む

待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震え出す今この時が
見つけた気がした
失われた記憶が呼び覚ました
物語永遠のその終わり

いつの間にか駆け出してた
あなたに手を引かれてた
昨日は遠く明日はすぐ
そんな当たり前に心が踊った

聞こえた気がした
感じた気がしたんだ
震え出す今この胸で
もう来る気がした
幾千の朝を越え新しい日が
待ってる気がした
呼んでる気がしたんだ
震えてるこの魂が
見つけた気がした
幾億の夢のように消え去れる日を
見送った手を振った、ありがとうと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Waking up and repeating the cycle, morning
Tightening the collar of my tie
Passing through the classroom door
I can walk with a little pride
In this everyday life, a breeze blows through

I felt like I heard it
I felt like I sensed it
In this trembling heart right now
I felt like it's coming
As billions of stars fade away
I waved goodbye, saying 'Good for you'

Looking down from the corner of the hallway during cleaning
I think it's strange
Even though time inside me has stopped
It feels like I'm living different days
Pride piles up like snow

I felt like I'm waiting
I felt like it's calling me
In this trembling moment right now
I felt like I found it
Awakening lost memories
A story of eternal endings

Unconsciously running out
Holding hands with you
Yesterday seems far, tomorrow is near
My heart danced to such a normalcy

I felt like I heard it
I felt like I sensed it
In this trembling heart right now
I felt like it's coming
Crossing over thousands of mornings, a new day
I felt like it's waiting
I felt like it's calling me
This trembling soul
I felt like it found it
As days can disappear like billions of dreams
I waved goodbye, saying 'Thank you'
